problem_solved: Fragmented clinical trial systems with siloed data and manual processes
solution_description: Unified clinical trial platform from Oracle including CTMS, EDC, randomization, and supply management. Cloud-based suite integrates with Oracle Health and other Oracle products.
notes: Oracle's clinical trial offering. Competes with Medidata, Veeva Vault. Legacy Siebel customer base. Cerner acquisition adds healthcare system footprint.
